details.title: \textbf{Job Portal Platform}
descriptions: Built a job portal platform that is focused on the tech industry to connect the candidates with the best opportunities.
Added Automated Job Scraping to the platform to get the latest jobs from the web from Amazon, Google, Atlassian etc.
Started as an personal project to understand the job trends live and to get the latest jobs from the web.
details.scale: Tech Job Portal platform with AI-powered matching and automation

details.title: \textbf{Lead Reachout Funnel}
descriptions: Lead the Product from Scratch to a point where it is self-sustaining, generating leads and revenue.
Developed reachout funnel that leads to more engagement and revenue by using AI powered outreach with Analytics.
details.Effect: Scaling from \textbf{0 to 20K+ monthly revenue} with efficient lead reachout

details.title: \textbf{Sellers Automation}
descriptions: Introduced the Seller Content classification system to automate the content creation and quality control.
details.Effect: Serving \textbf{30K+} Sellers with AI Powered Content Creation and Quality Control

details.title: \textbf{Amazon Scraping Integration}
descriptions: Bypass the Scraping Blockers of amazon to get the Reviews , Content and Listings data in scale.
details.Effect: Serving \textbf{30K+} Products data enhance the reachability of the sellers

details.title: \textbf{Automated Resume \& Portfolio System}
descriptions: Built an automated system that generates multiple resume variants and a portfolio website from JSON.
Implemented LuaTeX-based PDF generation with custom LaTeX templates for professional resume.
Integrated Jekyll static site generator to automatically create and deploy portfolio website from the same data.
Eliminated manual resume updates - simply edit JSON files to regenerate all resume variants and website simultaneously.
details.languages: Stack:- LuaTeX, LaTeX, Jekyll, Ruby, Lua, JSON
details.scale: Single source of truth generating \textbf{4 resume variants + portfolio website}
